Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 212 

SEMIPRVT_ROOM_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Semi-Private Room Charge Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for semi-private room accommodations related to a 
beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: SPRVTAMT 

LONG NAME: SEMIPRVT_ROOM_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total
